_comment: D5 fixture for /demos/byoc-hashbrown and /demos/byoc-json-render. Substrings 'render a byoc hashbrown' and 'render a byoc json' are unique.

response.content: The hashbrown BYOC component received the agent's structured payload and rendered it through the user-supplied component. The bring-your-own-component contract worked end-to-end.
The JSON-render BYOC component received the agent's structured payload and rendered it. The user-supplied component formatted the JSON output correctly.
